Terms and Conditions

Effective Date:06/04/25

1. Introduction

Welcome to Fyphost.com. These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") govern your use of our website and hosting services. By accessing or using Fyphost.com ("we", "us", or "our"), you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, you must not use our services.

2. Services

Fyphost provides web hosting, domain registration, and related internet services. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue services at any time without notice.

3. User Accounts

  • You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account.
  • You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials.
  • We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms or are found to be fraudulent.

4. Acceptable Use

You agree not to use our services to:

  • Engage in unlawful activities
  • Transmit malware or harmful content
  • Host phishing, spam, or illegal content
  • Violate intellectual property rights
  • Interfere with the operation of our systems or other users’ services

5. Payments and Billing

All services are subject to fees as outlined on our website. You agree to:

  • Pay all charges on time
  • Provide valid billing information
  • Allow us to suspend or cancel services for non-payment

6. Cancellation and Refunds

You may cancel services at any time via your account dashboard or by contacting us. Refunds are subject to our Refund Policy, which may vary based on the product or promotion.

7. Intellectual Property

All content, trademarks, and technology provided by Fyphost are the property of Fyphost or its licensors. You may not use, copy, or distribute any part of our services without written permission.

8. Limitation of Liability

Fyphost shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use our services, even if we have been advised of the possibility of such damages.

9. Service Availability

While we strive to provide 99.9% uptime, we do not guarantee uninterrupted access to our services. Planned or emergency maintenance may temporarily affect service availability.

10. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Fyphost, its affiliates, employees, and partners from any claims, damages, or losses arising from your use of the services or your violation of these Terms.

11. Modifications

We may modify these Terms at any time. Continued use of our services after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the revised Terms.

12. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws. Any disputes will be resolved in the courts of that khuniyachak,balpai,hooghly,wb,india, 712416.

13. Contact Us

If you have questions about these Terms, contact us at:

14. Account Verification & KYC

Fyphost reserves the right to require identity verification (Know Your Customer – KYC) for any account at its sole discretion. Fyphost may push any account into KYC verification at any time, including but not limited to situations involving suspicious activity, security concerns, regulatory obligations, or compliance reviews.

Failure to complete the requested verification accurately and within the specified timeframe may result in temporary restrictions, suspension, or permanent termination of the account without liability to Fyphost.

15. Purchase Cancellation During KYC Verification

If a purchase is cancelled while an account is under KYC verification, the refunded amount will be credited to the user’s Fyphost account balance. Due to pending or unverified identity and security checks, refunds will not be issued to the original payment method until KYC verification is successfully completed.

Email: support@fyphost.com
Website: www.fyphost.com
